info.title: Sensor Alerts Contract
info.description: Governs real-time sensor alert events ingested into the bronze lakehouse layer. Enforces business rules at ingestion time via the ContractEngine (Shift-Left governance).

roles.description: Produces sensor alert events to the Kafka topic
Reads certified alert data from the Bronze Iceberg table
Responsible for pipeline and contract maintenance

fields.name: alert_id
fields.description: Unique alert identifier (UUID). Nullable — assigned downstream if missing.

fields.name: machine_id
fields.description: Parent machine identifier. Nullable for standalone sensors.

fields.name: severity
fields.description: Alert severity level. Must be a known enumeration value.

fields.name: event_time
fields.description: ISO-8601 UTC timestamp of when the alert was triggered.

quality.description: Business rule validation applied at ingestion time by the ContractEngine.

rules.name: valid-severity
rules.description: Severity must be a known enumeration value.

rules.name: valid-alert-type
rules.description: Alert type must be a known classification.

rules.name: sensor-id-not-empty
rules.description: sensor_id is required and must not be null or empty.

rules.name: event-time-not-future
rules.description: event_time must not be in the future.
